goal: Build a 5-part kitting station: a Franka Panda picks one part from each of 5 labeled source bins and places each into its dedicated slot in a 5-slot kit tray. Parts are distinct (PCB, screw, housing, label, bracket — each a 0.05m cube with a unique semantic label). No conveyor: the robot visits each bin in sequence guided by hardcoded pick-order, then drops into the matching tray slot. Exercises Franka reach geometry across a radial bin arrangement, create_kit_tray with slot_layout='linear_5', and setup_pick_place_controller with a per-source-to-slot drop_targets map. ONET SOC 51-2098 kit-prep operator.
thoughts:
Design rationale for CP-NEW-kit-prep-operator:

1) Robot and reach geometry: Franka Panda reach ~0.85m. Mounted on a 0.75m table. Table at origin. Bins arranged in a fan: 3 bins in front (y=+0.35) at x=-0.40, 0.0, +0.40; 2 bins behind-left/right (x=±0.30, y=-0.30). All bin centres within 0.50m horizontal of robot base — safely inside reach. Bin size 0.10×0.10×0.05m (tray-like shallow box). Part (0.05m cube) centre z = table_top(0.75) + bin_height(0.05) + part_size/2(0.025) = 0.825.

2) Kit tray: placed at [0, -0.52, 0.775] (behind robot, 0.52m from base). tray_size=[0.55, 0.10, 0.03]. slot_layout='linear_5', slot_size=0.05, slot_spacing=0.10 → 5 slots at x = -0.20, -0.10, 0.00, +0.10, +0.20, y=-0.52, z_top=0.805, part drop_z = 0.805 + 0.025 = 0.830. Maximum distance from robot base to tray far slot (x=±0.20, y=-0.52): sqrt(0.20^2 + 0.52^2) = 0.557m — inside 0.85m reach.

3) Part semantic labels: PCB → Part_1, screw → Part_2, housing → Part_3, label → Part_4, bracket → Part_5. set_semantic_label gives each part a distinct class so retrieve-by-class queries work.

4) No conveyor: parts start inside bins at rest. pick_order sequence: Part_1→slot_1, Part_2→slot_2, ..., Part_5→slot_5. setup_pick_place_controller called with source_paths=part_paths and drop_targets mapping each part path to its slot centre. proximity sensor at each bin is not needed (parts are static); a single per-part trigger is implicit in the pick sequence.

5) Physics: CPU dynamics (enable_gpu_dynamics=False, broadphase_type=MBP). Part mass default 0.2 kg each. rubber material reduces slide on tray surface. sleepThreshold=0.0 keeps parts simulated through verify phase.

6) Franka vs UR10: Franka gripper is parallel-jaw, grasps 0.05m cubes cleanly. UR10 from A1 (palletizer) handles 0.10m boxes on conveyor. This canonical's 0.05m parts and static-bin configuration is a natural Franka domain.

7) Slot positions for linear_5 at tray origin [0, -0.52, 0.775]: tray half-extent x = 0.55/2 = 0.275. Slots at x offsets [-0.20, -0.10, 0.00, +0.10, +0.20], y = -0.52, drop_z = 0.775 + 0.03 + 0.025 = 0.830.
code:
# ── Scene skeleton ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")

# Robot work table (1.0 × 0.8 × 0.75m)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.5, 0.4, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Physics scene: CPU dynamics for determinism ───────────────────────────────
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# ── Franka Panda robot ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Reach ~0.85m; all bins within 0.50m horizontal — well inside envelope.
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

# ── 5 source bins (shallow tray-like boxes on table surface) ─────────────────
# 3 front bins at y=+0.35; 2 rear bins at y=-0.30
# Bin top z = table_top(0.75) + bin_height(0.05) = 0.80
# Part centre z = 0.75 + 0.05 + 0.025 = 0.825
bin_positions = [
    [-0.40, 0.35, 0.775],   # Bin_1 (PCB)    — front-left
    [ 0.00, 0.35, 0.775],   # Bin_2 (screw)  — front-centre
    [ 0.40, 0.35, 0.775],   # Bin_3 (housing)— front-right
    [-0.30,-0.30, 0.775],   # Bin_4 (label)  — rear-left
    [ 0.30,-0.30, 0.775],   # Bin_5 (bracket)— rear-right
]

for i, pos in enumerate(bin_positions):
    bin_path = f"/World/Bin_{i+1}"
    create_prim(
        prim_path=bin_path,
        prim_type="Cube",
        position=pos,
        scale=[0.055, 0.055, 0.025],  # 0.11×0.11×0.05m shallow bin
    )
    apply_api_schema(prim_path=bin_path, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── 5 distinct parts (0.05m cubes with unique semantic labels) ────────────────
# Each part sits inside its source bin at rest.
part_labels = ["PCB", "screw", "housing", "label", "bracket"]
part_positions = [
    [-0.40, 0.35, 0.825],   # Part_1 in Bin_1
    [ 0.00, 0.35, 0.825],   # Part_2 in Bin_2
    [ 0.40, 0.35, 0.825],   # Part_3 in Bin_3
    [-0.30,-0.30, 0.825],   # Part_4 in Bin_4
    [ 0.30,-0.30, 0.825],   # Part_5 in Bin_5
]

part_paths = [f"/World/Part_{i+1}" for i in range(5)]

for i, (path, pos, label) in enumerate(zip(part_paths, part_positions, part_labels)):
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=pos, size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)
    set_semantic_label(prim_path=path, label=label, class_name="kit_part")

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=part_paths,
    attr="physics:mass",
    value=0.2,
)
bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=part_paths,
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
for path in part_paths:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

# ── Kit tray (5-slot linear arrangement) ─────────────────────────────────────
# Tray behind robot at [0, -0.52, 0.775]. linear_5: 5 slots at
# x = -0.20, -0.10, 0.00, +0.10, +0.20, y=-0.52, z_top=0.805.
# Drop z = tray_top(0.805) + part_size/2(0.025) = 0.830.
create_kit_tray(
    tray_path="/World/KitTray",
    position=[0, -0.52, 0.775],
    tray_size=[0.55, 0.10, 0.03],
    slot_layout="linear_5",
    slot_size=0.05,
    slot_spacing=0.10,
)

# ── Pre-computed slot drop targets ───────────────────────────────────────────
# linear_5 with slot_size=0.05, slot_spacing=0.10 → slots at x offsets:
# slot_1=-0.20, slot_2=-0.10, slot_3=0.00, slot_4=+0.10, slot_5=+0.20
# All at y=-0.52, z=0.830
drop_targets = {
    "/World/Part_1": [-0.20, -0.52, 0.830],
    "/World/Part_2": [-0.10, -0.52, 0.830],
    "/World/Part_3": [ 0.00, -0.52, 0.830],
    "/World/Part_4": [ 0.10, -0.52, 0.830],
    "/World/Part_5": [ 0.20, -0.52, 0.830],
}

# ── cuRobo pick-place controller ──────────────────────────────────────────────
# No conveyor; source_paths are bins (static parts). sensor_path=None.
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    source_paths=part_paths,
    destination_path="/World/KitTray",
    drop_targets=drop_targets,
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/KitTray",
                        "/World/Bin_1", "/World/Bin_2", "/World/Bin_3",
                        "/World/Bin_4", "/World/Bin_5"],
)
failure_modes: Franka gripper too wide for 0.05m part — default ParallelGripper finger width may need adjustment; set gripper_width=0.04 in setup_pick_place_controller if grasps fail.
Bin wall collision during pick — bin walls are 0.055m half-extents; part at bin centre has 0.025m clearance per side. If cuRobo path clips bin, widen bin scale to [0.07, 0.07, 0.025] and recheck.

linear_5 slot_layout not recognised by create_kit_tray — fallback: replace create_kit_tray with manual Xform/slot creation using create_prim for each slot and explicit drop_targets dict (already present here).

Rear bin reach margin — Bin_4 at [-0.30, -0.30] and Bin_5 at [+0.30, -0.30] are 0.424m from robot base. Franka reach is 0.85m so margin is large; however wrist-orientation for low parts may hit joint limits — add 'joint_limit_avoidance=True' if cuRobo reports IK failures.

KitTray slots overlap kit parts after placement — 0.05m parts in 0.10m-spaced slots have 0.05m clearance; PhysX contact between adjacent placed parts is possible. Increase slot_spacing to 0.12 (tray_size to [0.59, 0.10, 0.03]) if adjacent-part collision is observed.

workpieces.note: Part order matches slot order; Part_N → slot_N

code_template:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.5, 0.4, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)

for bin_role in [{{source_bins[0]}}, {{source_bins[1]}}, {{source_bins[2]}}, {{source_bins[3]}}, {{source_bins[4]}}]:
    create_prim(prim_path=bin_role['path'], prim_type="Cube", position=bin_role['position'], scale=bin_role['scale'])
    apply_api_schema(prim_path=bin_role['path'], schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

part_paths = [{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}, {{workpieces[4].path}}]
part_labels = [{{workpieces[0].label}}, {{workpieces[1].label}}, {{workpieces[2].label}}, {{workpieces[3].label}}, {{workpieces[4].label}}]
part_positions = [{{workpieces[0].position}}, {{workpieces[1].position}}, {{workpieces[2].position}}, {{workpieces[3].position}}, {{workpieces[4].position}}]

for path, pos, label in zip(part_paths, part_positions, part_labels):
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=pos, size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)
    set_semantic_label(prim_path=path, label=label, class_name="kit_part")

bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=part_paths, attr="physics:mass", value=0.2)
bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=part_paths, attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
for path in part_paths:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

create_kit_tray(
    tray_path={{kit_tray.path}},
    position={{kit_tray.position}},
    tray_size={{kit_tray.tray_size}},
    slot_layout={{kit_tray.slot_layout}},
    slot_size={{kit_tray.slot_size}},
    slot_spacing={{kit_tray.slot_spacing}},
)

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_source="curobo",
    source_paths=part_paths,
    destination_path={{kit_tray.path}},
    drop_targets={
        {{workpieces[0].path}}: {{workpieces[0].drop_target}},
        {{workpieces[1].path}}: {{workpieces[1].drop_target}},
        {{workpieces[2].path}}: {{workpieces[2].drop_target}},
        {{workpieces[3].path}}: {{workpieces[3].drop_target}},
        {{workpieces[4].path}}: {{workpieces[4].drop_target}},
    },
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{kit_tray.path}},
                        {{source_bins[0].path}}, {{source_bins[1].path}}, {{source_bins[2].path}},
                        {{source_bins[3].path}}, {{source_bins[4].path}}],
)
